cleavage agent: selecting trypsin as an enzyme (1 missed cleavage allowed)
enrichment method: After the immunoprecipitation, beads were subjected to two additional washes with water
fragmentation method: fragmented in the HCD collision cell
instrument: The Q-Exactive was operated in a data-dependent acquisition mode
labeling: LC-MS/MS raw files were label-free quantified using the Progenesis QI for proteomics software
reduction reagent: supplemented with 1 mM DTT and protease inhibitors
reduction concentration: supplemented with 1 mM DTT and protease inhibitors
